name: Halcyon Agri Corporation Limited
summary: Halcyon Agri Corporation Limited, an investment holding company, originates, produces, and distributes natural rubber products in Singapore, China, the United States, Canada, Europe, rest of Asia, and internationally. It operates through Corrie MacColl Group; HRC Group; SINRIO Group; and Corporate segments. The company processes and produces technically specified rubber, crumb rubber, and latex, as well as constant viscosity rubber products; and owns rubber plantations approximately 110,000 hectares of land in Malaysia and Cameroon. It provides its natural rubber primarily under the HeveaPRO brand, as well as procures other origins and grades of rubber from third party producers. The company offers its products for use in tires, shoe soles, medical gloves, seals, gaskets, and others through a network of logistical assets and sales offices. It is also involved in trading and distribution of natural rubber, latex, and synthetic rubber under the Centrotrade, Wurfbain, Corrie MacColl, Alan L. Grant, Momentum Technologies, and Kelvin Terminals brand names; and manufactures and distributes plastic products, as well as operates oil palm plantations. The company was founded in 1934 and is headquartered in Singapore. As of December 31, 2018, Halcyon Agri Corporation Limited operates as a subsidiary of Sinochem International (Overseas) Pte. Ltd.
